title: Mining Mastery
summary: Mining mastery now splits between a quarry runner who tears through stone and ore, and a deep delver who turns dangerous depths into profitable ground.

thresholds.title: First Strike
thresholds.description: Choose whether your mining favors relentless extraction or deeper prospecting.

thresholds.title: Steady Excavation
thresholds.description: Your chosen route starts changing the pace and safety of a run.

thresholds.title: Ore Sense
thresholds.description: A committed specialist now feels distinct in the tunnel.

thresholds.title: Deep Delver
thresholds.description: Late mastery turns your branch into a full mining identity.

nodes.title: Clean Cuts
nodes.description: The quarry route tears through stone and deepslate with ruthless efficiency.

nodes.title: Prospector's Eye
nodes.description: The prospecting route closes faster on ore and favors targeted extraction.

nodes.title: Vein Following
nodes.description: Each ore pocket can feed a burst of speed, letting a quarry runner chain deposits together.

nodes.title: Deep Scan
nodes.description: A deep delver learns to see in poor light and read the dark more confidently.

nodes.title: Quarry Discipline
nodes.description: Stone breaks feed your tempo, turning tunnel work into an uninterrupted rush.

nodes.title: Voidward Prospecting
nodes.description: The deepest runs become survivable, letting a prospecting specialist stay in hostile ground longer.
